message:
feat(vfs): re-export MemoryVfsConfig and MemoryVfsUsageSnapshot

The memory VFS submodule already exposes `MemoryVfsConfig` and
`MemoryVfsUsageSnapshot` for configuring in-memory databases and for
reading the current memory accounting snapshot, but they were not
re-exported at the `fsqlite_vfs` crate root. This forced downstream
consumers to use the fully-qualified `fsqlite_vfs::memory::...` path
and broke symmetry with the already re-exported `MemoryFile` and
`MemoryVfs` types.

Extend the existing `pub use memory::{MemoryFile, MemoryVfs};` line
to also re-export `MemoryVfsConfig` and `MemoryVfsUsageSnapshot`.
Pure plumbing change, no behavior difference.
